bird.name: Swamp sparrow
bird.summary: The swamp sparrow (Melospiza georgiana) is a medium-sized New World sparrow related to the song sparrow. Description Measurements: Length:…

relations.subject: Swamp sparrow
relations.evidence: Their breeding habitat is marshes, including brackish marshes, across eastern North America and central Canada
relations.object_summary: 具有较高含水量和密生植被的浅水环境。

relations.subject: Swamp sparrow
relations.evidence: In its southern range and in coastal habitats their numbers have locally declined, in part due to habitat loss
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。
